About

Full-stack developer with 11+ years of experience delivering web applications and content platforms in agency environments. Deep expertise in WordPress and PHP, with strong range across modern JavaScript frameworks, mobile development, and back-end systems. Comfortable leading small teams, making architecture decisions, and shipping reliable, maintainable software on tight timelines.

WordPress PHP JavaScript TypeScript React React Native Next.js Gatsby.js Node.js GraphQL HTML CSS Sass Tailwind SQL C# .NET Rust Git CI/CD Docker AWS Linux
